exort.message.debug_load_usage: Usage: /exort debug benchmark start [players] [seconds] | /exort debug benchmark stop
exort.message.debug_load_started: Cipra junta started for %1$s simulated kelci.
exort.message.debug_load_verdict: Lojban benchmark verdict: %1$s (TPS min %2$s, max %3$s, avg %4$s, p1 %5$s; MSPT min %6$s, max %7$s, avg %8$s, p95 %9$s, p99 %10$s)
exort.message.debug_load_rare_stalls: Lojban: Rare stalls: %1$s sample(s) below TPS 12, min %2$s.
exort.message.debug_load_summary: Lojban benchmark: kelci %1$s, chunks %2$s, sorcu/chunk %3$s, tanboes/chunk %4$s, jarcos/chunk %5$s, ops/tick %6$s (global %7$s, chunk %8$s), db/tick %9$s, jarco updates %10$s/t%11$s, skori %12$s/%13$s miss %14$s%% cover %15$s%%, window %16$ss after setup (warmup %17$ss), jitter %18$s%%, guard players %19$s, guard entities %20$s/%21$s, guard churn %22$s/tick, world lanes %23$s, world ops/tick %24$s, world blocks %25$s, water-test skori length %26$s, water sources %27$s, water chunks %28$s
exort.message.debug_load_measurement_sta: Lojban: Benchmark measurement started after setup and water-flow stabilization.
exort.message.debug_load_hints: Lojban benchmark hints: dominant %1$s; CPU %2$s%%, SKORI %3$s%%, DISPLAYS %4$s%%, DB %5$s%%, WIRELESS %6$s%%, GUARDS %7$s%%, WORLD %8$s%% (placements %9$s).
exort.message.debug_load_mspt_verdict: Lojban: Sustained MSPT verdict: %1$s (avg %2$s, p95 %3$s, p99 %4$s).
exort.message.debug_load_metadata: Lojban: Benchmark metadata: server %1$s, Exort %2$s, Java %3$s, plugins %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_recent_runs: Lojban: Recent benchmark runs (%1$s): TPS avg %2$s, MSPT avg %3$s, MSPT p95 %4$s.
exort.message.debug_load_move_away: Lojban: Move %1$s chunks away from Exort blocks or disable benchmark.simulateDisplays.
exort.message.debug_cache_mode_invalid: na se djuno cache verbose tadji: %1$s. Use compact/normal/full.

exort.message.debug_cache_status_cache: Lojban: Cache: loaded=%1$s dirty=%2$s viewers=%3$s idleMs=%4$s (%5$ss)
exort.message.debug_cache_status_evict: Lojban: Evict: eligible=%1$s idleMs=%2$s/%3$s dirty=%4$s viewers=%5$s loading=%6$s

exort.message.version: Exort Sorcu Network v%1$s by phantomfighterxx

exort.message.usage_resourcepack_send: send ready velcki bakfu to kelci or all
exort.message.mode_set: Configured tadji set to %1$s; effective tadji: %2$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_missing: na kakne lo nu gasnu lo RESOURCE tadji: lo Paper config datnyvei cu na se facki vi %1$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_error: Cannot enable RESOURCE tadji: failed to read or update %1$s: %2$s. Set %3$s: true manually in this file and restart the server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_access_deni: Cannot enable RESOURCE tadji: Exort cannot write %1$s. Check file permissions, or set %2$s: true manually and restart the server.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_changed: Lojban: Paper config updated: %1$s set to true in %2$s.
exort.message.mode_fix_paper_restart_req: Lojban: Paper config already has %1$s: true in %2$s, but the current Paper runtime still needs a restart.
exort.message.mode_fix_exort_changed: Exort config updated: tadji set to RESOURCE.
exort.message.mode_fix_restart_scheduled: Server restart will run in 10 seconds.
exort.message.mode_blocked: Cannot enable RESOURCE: Paper’s block-updates.disable-chorus-plant-updates is not cando.
exort.message.pack_sent_all: Velcki bakfu request sent to %1$s kelci.
exort.message.pack_status.provider_note: Velcki bakfu handoff ready for %1$s; provider includes it during startup/pack generation. If %1$s was already enabled, restart or reload provider manually.
exort.message.resource_pack.required_fai: Required Exort velcki bakfu failed to load. Reconnect and accept it.
